# Various topics


## K-Means Clustering

{{< include _kmeans.qmd >}} 

## Database Operation with Structured Query Language(SQL)

{{< include _SQL_and_Data_Manipulation.qmd >}}

## Import and Export Data

{{< include _ImportExportData.qmd >}} 

## Data Manipulation with Pandas

{{< include _pandas.qmd >}}

## Web Scraping

{{< include _webscraping.qmd >}}

## Random Forests

{{< include _random_forests.qmd >}}

## Markov Chains and Hidden Markov Models

{{< include _markov.qmd >}}

## LLM Agents

{{< include LLM-Agents/LLM-Agents.qmd >}}

## Gramar of Graphics

{{< include _Grammar_of_Graphics.qmd >}}
